case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. HAN P CHENG AKA HANCHENG et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAN P CHENG AKA HANCHENG $17,892.41 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,317.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HAN P CHENG AKA HANCHENG DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-10-2014
DECLARATION RE: UNDERLYING ACTION OF ACCOUNT STATED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED APR-02-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HAN P CHENG AKA HANCHENG
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $425.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HAN P CHENG AKA HANCHENG

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 56567750) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HAN P CHENG AKA HANCHENG
